title: Introduction to Digital Asset Management (DAM)
description:
The introduction to Digital Asset Management (DAM) course is critical to managing large collections of digital content, digital assets, and metadata. Having a solid understanding of user experience and organizational digital asset needs will help get your management system and process underway. This course covers topics such as: 
 
 
 Identifying digital asset management role in institutions 
 
 
 Defining standards and tools used in digital asset management 
 
 
 Build your fundamentals of digital assets and digital asset management through this introductory course.
